name: atb
description: assets/images/ ├── cars/               ← Car photos (main shots, gallery, interior) ├── brands/             ← Brand logos (PNG, transparent background) ├── services/           ← Service photos (detailing, workshop, etc.) ├── banners/            ← Homepage & section hero banners ├── og/                 ← Open Graph / social sharing images ├── icons/              ← App icons (PWA, favicon variants) └── team/               ← Team member photos (optional)
